commands: set --; sample_nb=''; for nb in submissions/*Basics_Day3*.ipynb; do [ "$nb" = 'submissions/*Basics_Day3*.ipynb' ] && continue; if [ "$nb" = 'submissions/Basics_Day3_homework_test_filled.ipynb' ]; then sample_nb="$nb"; continue; fi; set -- "$@" "$nb"; done; if [ "$#" -eq 0 ] && [ -n "$sample_nb" ]; then set -- "$sample_nb"; fi; if [ "$#" -eq 0 ]; then echo 'ERROR: No matching Day 3 notebook found; add exactly one non-sample submission or keep the bundled sample notebook for fallback grading'; exit 1; fi; if [ "$#" -ne 1 ]; then echo 'ERROR: Multiple matching Day 3 notebooks found'; exit 1; fi; jupyter nbconvert --to script "$1" --output basics_day3 --output-dir .
if [ ! -f basics_day3.py ]; then echo 'ERROR: Notebook conversion failed - basics_day3.py not found'; exit 1; fi
